message: I heard a drop in the distance.
Somewhere far away...
Where am I?
That's what I always think when I wake up.
I heard a bell in the distance.
In some far off city.
No, that wasn't the sound of a bell. It was the sound of an insect flapping its wings.
The sound of a winged insect...
Hundreds, thousands, millions, billions... of winged insects.
At school, the only sound I hear is the sound of the bell...
Not the sound of winged insects.
Or maybe that too is just an auditory hallucination.
An illusion that doesn't really exist.
I couldn't hear that sound anymore.
A faint landscape.
This is... my room.
When did I come home? I don't remember that at all.
But it's always like that when I wake up.
I can never remember what I was doing before I went to sleep, or where I was, or even what time I went to sleep.
My heart is just relaxed... and everything feels distant.
Everything feels nice and even.

name: Takuji
message: "Now then..."
First, I turned on my computer.
I organized my thoughts as I watched my computer start up.

name: Takuji
message: "Oh, right. Last night, I rode my bicycle from the school to Suginomiya and put Takashima-san's hair in that spot... Then I came home..."
I connected to the Internet, looked at the posts since last night, and posted on the message board as the savior.

name: Takuji
message: "Phone..."
I got a message on my cell phone.
It was from Tachibana Kimika.
She was watching Senagawa Yui's movements for me.
I checked the message she had sent me.

name: Takuji
message: "Hmm... Senagawa went to the school at six in the morning, huh..."
Though I guess I did write in one of the automated messages that Takashima-san would be going to her house at about this time.
She wanted to run away somewhere and she chose the school, huh... What a dull choice.
I looked at Takashima-san's phone.
The inbox was full of messages from Senagawa Yui.

name: Takuji
message: "Hehehe... She's actually responding to a ghost."
to: Takashima Zakuro
subject: Re:
Don't come to my room.
Please.
Please don't come.
I'll go find your doll.

name: Takuji
message: "So she went to the school to look for that doll? There's no way she's going to be able to find it after this long, though."
Senagawa doesn't even know what kind of doll it is. How is she going to look for something she won't recognize?

name: Takuji
message: "Well, whatever..."

name: Takuji
message: "But still, that was easier than I expected."
Senagawa was nicknamed the steel lady by the students, so I thought it would take a bit longer than that to peel away her psychological defenses.
Even if she acts tough, she's still a woman. They're born in a position favored by society.
Now I just have to decide how I'm going to lead her to suicide.

name: Takuji
message: "It might be better to stop the automated messages and send them by hand."

name: Takuji
message: "By hand... There we go."

name: Takuji
message: "Something like this..."
i came to your room but
why aren't you here?
when i touched the cute dolls in your room
all their heads came off

name: Takuji
message: "The time right now is..."
I still had to wait about twenty minutes until I could send the message.
From here on, I would have to send the curse mail to Senagawa by hand.
I had to make sure I didn't forget the time.
I set a timer so that my cell phone would vibrate once an hour.
I set it to remind me five minutes before every hour. Though, since I'm sending it manually, there will still be some discrepancy in the time.
No one would notice something like that, though.

name: Takuji
message: "I'll chase her into a corner, once every hour... And then... I'll kill her."
I won't dirty my own hands. I'll kill her with my miracle.
A perfect crime that only the savior could commit.
I'd already thought of several ways I could ultimately kill her.
I prepared for every possible scenario. Different methods of killing filled my brain.
There are four possible choices in one turn... and the route diverges in thirty-two places before the end.
Even with just four possible choices at each divergence, thirty-two points of divergence means there are over eighteen quintillion possibilities.
Of those, 18,446,744,073,709,551,798 are bad ends... In other words, failure.
Most of the 202 remaining endings couldn't be called success, though in all of them I would at least succeed in killing Senagawa.
There are only twelve endings where everything goes according to plan.
But I want the best possible route. I want one of two endings.
The first of the two optimal endings would be Senagawa committing suicide by jumping off the apartment building.
Of course, I'm talking about the same apartment building where Takashima Zakuro committed suicide.
This would be the most impressive death, and the most revelatory...
If she committed suicide there, a great number of people would witness it. It would be the most beautiful miracle. It's definitely a favorable outcome.
But there are several problems with this route.
The first problem is that since Takashima-san just committed suicide there a few days ago, the rooftop is off limits except for authorized personnel.
When I checked, all the entrances to the roof were locked, including the elevator and the fire escape.
The problem is how to get the key.
If I could get the key, it would be simple, but I haven't found any way to get the key so far.
I did consider the possibility of associating myself with one of the employees, but...
I probably already missed the flag to get on this route... I should assume it's impossible to start this route now.
The most realistic option is the second of the optimal outcomes, in which Senagawa would commit suicide by jumping off the top of Building C.
The Building C rooftop is locked, just like the apartment building rooftop in the first route.
So there's no way a normal student would be able to go up there.
It's off limits except for authorized personnel.
It's the same problem as in the first route.
But one variable is completely different in the second route.
Senagawa is authorized personnel.
Senagawa used to be the advisor of the Fine Arts Club, which has access to the Building C rooftop.
It wouldn't be hard for her to get the key and go up there.
After that, I just need to figure out how to drive her to suicide.
Either way...

name: Takuji
message: "It would be easiest to aim for the second route and make Senagawa commit suicide on Building C."
There are still plenty of difficulties with this plan, but it should be easy for the savior.
If I use the information from Tachibana to keep leading her on... I should hit the flag naturally.

name: Takuji
message: "Hehehe... I won't let the true ending hide from me."
School should've been starting soon, but...
There were hardly any other students.

name: Takuji
message: "Hehehehe... What's happening here?"
Yesterday, the school was perfectly normal... This change happened overnight. It almost looked like school was cancelled.
I didn't go into the school building. I walked toward my secret base instead.
I don't have very much time until the day when I must return the world to the sky. I still have a great many things I must accomplish.

name: Takuji
message: "...What's this?"
For some reason, there were a bunch of students gathered by the entrance to my secret base.
What are they all doing so close to my secret base?

name: Kimika
message: "I'm sorry, my savior..."

name: Takuji
message: "What's going on, Tachibana? You were supposed to be watching Senagawa."

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, don't worry about that. I'm watching her...
Could you spare some of your time?"

name: Takuji
message: "Time? Haa... I suppose..."

name: Takuji
message: "You're..."

name: Megu
message: "I-I'm Akasaka Megu. You dispelled Takashima's curse for me."

name: Takuji
message: "Oh, which means you're..."

name: Satoko
message: "Y-Yes, I'm Kitami Satoko."

name: Takuji
message: "Hmm... And? What about the others?"

name: Kimika
message: "Right... They wanted to meet the savior..."

name: Takuji
message: "And? Why are they here?"

name: Kimika
message: "Excuse me... I didn't mean to trouble you."

name: Takuji
message: "Yes, this is the site of my base. Don't allow anyone but my followers to come here."

name: Kimika
message: "In that case, there should be no problem. All of them want to follow you."

name: Takuji
message: "Oh, really..."

name: Megu
message: "Um, you said Mrs. Senagawa's name earlier, but is she really going to die today?"

name: Takuji
message: "Why?"

name: Megu
message: "There's a rumor about it..."

name: Takuji
message: "Oh, really... Aren't there plenty of other people who could die?"

name: Megu
message: "Ah!"

name: Satoko
message: "Y-You mean..."

name: Kimika
message: "That's right... If Senagawa dies, there's a good chance that I would be next. Though it might be someone else, too."

name: Megu
message: "Eh?"

name: Satoko
message: "Um, you mean..."

name: Takuji
message: "The two of you, Senagawa, and Tachibana... Do you understand me?"

name: Female Student
message: "Wh-What do you mean? Did Akasaka, Kitami, Tachibana, and Mrs. Senagawa do something?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, they did... They definitely did."

name: Female Student
message: "I-I knew it. It's Akasaka and Kitami's fault!"

name: Female Student
message: "And Tachibana! You too!"

name: Kimika
message: "Yes, it's my fault."

name: Female Student
message: "Th-Then we'll be saved, right? Those four are the ones who were cursed, right?"

name: Takuji
message: "Haa... Why didn't you explain this before you brought them along, Tachibana?"

name: Kimika
message: "I'm sorry...
I thought it would be more persuasive if they heard it from you."
So she's pushing the work onto me?

name: Takuji
message: "The end of the world on July 20th isn't related to Takashima Zakuro's curse. I shouldn't need to say this, but one vengeful spirit doesn't have enough power to destroy the world."

name: Female Student
message: "Th-Then what are those messages? Those creepy messages from Takashima-san?"

name: Takuji
message: "Those are her messages of love to all of you. She wants to save you all."

name: Female Student
message: "S-Save us?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yes... Allow me to ask a question. Why is she telling you the world is going to end over and over?"

name: Megu
message: "B-Because she resents us..."

name: Female Student
message: "Shut up! She only resents you four!"

name: Takuji
message: "Would you please not yell?"

name: Female Student
message: "Ah, s-sorry..."

name: Takuji
message: "Well, it is hard to imagine that Takashima Zakuro hated people she had hardly even knew."
Of course not. Though she must have hated all the people who saw her being bullied and did nothing.

name: Takuji
message: "If it's not resent, then what is her purpose in sending those messages after her death?"

name: Takuji
message: "Why would she keep telling you the world is about to end?"

name: Satoko
message: "The purpose of the messages..."

name: Kimika
message: "Because there is a way to save oneself?"

name: Takuji
message: "Correct."

name: Megu
message: "Eh? Really? We can be saved?"

name: Female Student
message: "But she hated you, so there's no way you'll be saved!"

name: Takuji
message: "You... How many times do I have to say it?"

name: Female Student
message: "Ah, s-sorry... I'm sorry!"

name: Takuji
message: "Akasaka Megu, Kitami Satoko, and Tachibana Kimika... These three won't be killed by the curse."

name: Female Student
message: "Eh? Why? Aren't they cursed?"

name: Takuji
message: "I already dispelled the curse."

name: Female Student
message: "D-Dispelled?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yes, therefore Takashima's vengeful spirit won't come for them."

name: Female Student
message: "Do you mean... Mrs. Senagawa is going to be the one to die?"

name: Takuji
message: "Exactly... I haven't dispelled her curse. Takashima still loathes her."

name: Megu
message: "W-Will Takashima's curse kill her?"

name: Satoko
message: "Th-Then... if you hadn't dispelled our curse..."

name: Kimika
message: "Of course. All three of us might have died today."

name: Female Student
message: "Th-Then you won't save Mrs. Senagawa?"

name: Takuji
message: "Hehehe... Why would I do something she didn't ask me to?"

name: Female Student
message: "B-But... you could at least tell her she's going to be killed by the curse."

name: Takuji
message: "The curse I dispelled from those two has been transferred to Senagawa."

name: Takuji
message: "Do you know what would happen if I dispelled it from her?"

name: Female Student
message: "Eh?"

name: Takuji
message: "The vengeful spirit wouldn't have a victim anymore. She might take anyone, even you... If you're okay with that, I suppose I could dispel her curse."

name: Female Student
message: "Ah, no, forget what I said. I'm sorry."

name: Takuji
message: "What is it?"

name: Female Student
message: "Um, I heard from someone that you said the prophecy wouldn't come true."

name: Takuji
message: "Hmm?"

name: Takuji
message: "What are you talking about?"

name: Female Student
message: "Yokoyama Yasuko is in my class, and... she told me that you said the prophecy could never come true."

name: Takuji
message: "What?"
What the hell?
What does that mean... I don't remember saying that.

name: Takuji
message: "When was that?"

name: Female Student
message: "Eh? Uh, I heard it the day after Takashima-san committed suicide."
Bizarre... That's impossible.
I don't remember talking to her at all that day.
What is this?

name: Female Student
message: "Um, does that mean you changed your mind?"

name: Takuji
message: "Hehehehehe..."

name: Takuji
message: "No, not at all... Not at all."

name: Takuji
message: "I would never change my mind... Is that not true?"

name: Female Student
message: "Eh? Oh, of course..."

name: Kimika
message: "That's right. the savior would never change his mind."

name: Takuji
message: "It's nonsense to say that the prophecy isn't true. The prophecy is already happening."

name: Megu
message: "You mean on the 20th..."

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, that's right."

name: Female Student
message: "Wait, you mean everyone's going to die?"

name: Takuji
message: "Maybe so..."

name: Kimika
message: "That's right. Everyone will die. Everyone..."

name: Female Student
message: "Th-That can't happen. I can't die yet. I still have so much I have to do before I die... And if I die, my mom will be so sad."

name: Takuji
message: "That shouldn't be a problem... Your mother will be dead too."

name: Female Student
message: "Of course that's a problem!"

name: Megu
message: "Dumbass!"

name: Female Student
message: "Ouch... What are you doing, Akasaka!"

name: Megu
message: "Who do you think you are? You need to be a bit more respectful toward the savior!"

name: Female Student
message: "Th-The savior?"

name: Megu
message: "Just now, Mamiya-kun... No, Mamiya-sama said 'maybe so,' didn't he?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah..."

name: Megu
message: "And he said there was a way we could be saved."

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, there is."

name: Female Student
message: "Really? Is there a way to be saved?! Answer me!"
The female student grabbed my lapels.
Oh jeez...

name: Female Student
message: "Agh!"

name: Female Student
message: "Wait, ah, agh, ow, w-wait!"
I was surprised...
After Akasaka knocked her over with a punch, Kitami jumped on top of her and started hitting her.
What a team... For girls, they're awfully accustomed to using violence.
I was shocked by their skill.

name: Kimika
message: "Ahahaha... You two are as amazing as always."
So that's the true nature of the two girls who terrified Tachibana and Takashima-san.
Anyone would want to commit suicide if they were getting bullied by these two.
She groaned quietly... and stopped moving.
All the girls huddled there frozen in fear.

name: Megu
message: "The world is going to end! It wouldn't make sense if it didn't! My boyfriend is already dead!"

name: Satoko
message: "The world is going to end! But there is a way to be saved!"
Oh, wow... Your boyfriend dying has nothing to do with the end of the world. You don't understand at all.

name: Kimika
message: "A way to be saved... Everyone wants to hear what you have to say, Mamiya-sama. Please, tell us."

name: Takuji
message: "Haa... You guys are a pain."

name: Megu
message: "I'll do anything I need to be saved! I can get you whatever you need!"

name: Satoko
message: "I-I'll do anything too. Anything!"
Just how desperate are these two?
Was it that hellish getting the curse mail the past few days?
One of the basics of brainwashing is to completely destroy a person's individual personality, but destroying someone's personality through fear normally takes quite a bit of work.
After finally being freed from Takashima's curse, and then immediately being faced with the end of the world, most people would try to follow someone else.

name: Takuji
message: "This is a story from ancient times..."

name: Takuji
message: "God in heaven looked out upon the people on Earth... and he despaired at the wickedness of man."

name: Takuji
message: "He resolved to send a great flood to blot out man from the face of land. Then he told a great prophet of his resolve."

name: Takuji
message: "The great prophet understood God's will, and he and his family constructed a monolithic ark."

name: Takuji
message: "During that time, the prophet tried to warn the people that the world would be flooded, but not a single one of the foolish people lent their ears to his words."

name: Kimika
message: "I know that story... It's Noah's Ark, from the Book of Genesis."

name: Takuji
message: "When Noah completed the ark, his wife, his three sons, and the three wives of his sons entered the ark... as well as two of every animal on the earth."

name: Takuji
message: "The world was covered in torrential rains for forty days and forty nights... And God destroyed all flesh in which is the breath of life under heaven."

name: Takuji
message: "Even after the rain stopped and the sky grew clear, the water did not abate for 150 days."

name: Megu
message: "So we have to build an ark..."

name: Takuji
message: "Hehehe... This is just an old story. Besides, God made a promise to the people."

name: Takuji
message: "That he will never again bring about a great flood to destroy all living things..."

name: Satoko
message: "Eh? It won't happen again? Then the world will be fine?"

name: Takuji
message: "Listen to what I said. He only promised he wouldn't cause another flood."

name: Kimika
message: "In other words..."

name: Takuji
message: "Constructing an ark won't save us from the world's destruction."

name: Takuji
message: "It would be like using an umbrella in a burning building. An utterly fruitless effort."

name: Megu
message: "Th-Then..."

name: Takuji
message: "Hmm... I'll tell you when the time comes."

name: Takuji
message: "But I'm not softhearted enough to save all of humanity."

name: Takuji
message: "Don't worry... I'll save you."

name: Megu
message: "Eh? R-Really?"

name: Satoko
message: "U-Um, what about me?"

name: Takuji
message: "Don't worry."

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, there's no problem. No problem. More importantly..."

name: Takuji
message: "If you have any friends that wish to be saved, you may bring them to me."

name: Takuji
message: "But only people who believe in my prophecy."

name: Takuji
message: "If you bring a nonbeliever here, I..."

name: Takuji
message: "...won't save any of you."
The group dissolved.
They could act freely.
But if they bring a single nonbeliever to me, I won't save any of them.
If one person betrays me, they will all die.
I made sure that fact was clear.

name: Takuji
message: "Now then..."
from: Takashima Zakuro
subject: no subject
another one will die
from the roof into the courtyard
they will keep dying and you can't stop it
soon it will all end
Anyway, I sent out the prediction in one of Takashima-san's messages. I did tell the prediction to some of them directly, but this is still the most effective way.
Now then...
What... What is this feeling?

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-What... is this?"

name: Takuji
message: "This is..."
Our frequencies don't match?
This feeling...
It was the same as the first time.
Why?

name: Takuji
message: "Riruru-chan."

name: Takuji
message: "Why don't our frequencies match?"
The Holy Surge was already tuned, but this feeling...

name: Takuji
message: "This is because of last night!"
Last night, White Riruru-chan and Black Riruru-chan fought the final battle that stretched across the universe.
Every single Riruru-chan was turned into chunks of meat.
But since someone was trying to reach me with the Holy Surge, that meant...

name: Takuji
message: "Riruru-chan came back to life after I put her back together!"
What a miracle.
Of course, I only did it because there was a possibility of success, but I actually succeeded in reviving an angel!
Fear the savior, Mamiya Takuji!

name: Takuji
message: "Riruru-chan!"
The first time, she called out to me, but this time was different. I had to call out to her.
I carefully started tuning... After taking that much damage, she must be desperately sending the Holy Surge out to me.

name: Takuji
message: "I'm the savior. I can handle a little bit of tuning..."
I used my power as the savior.
I used my fearsome powers of concentration to search for Riruru-chan's Holy Surge within the infinite sea of frequencies.

name: Takuji
message: "Imagine how she looks! Create her body! And then give it shape!"
I slowly adjusted the superdimensional vibrations to match her frequency.
My Holy Surge rises above dimensions!
The road illuminated by the M-theory!
I break through the film of the second dimension!
I break through the films of...
...The third, fourth, and fifth dimensional frequencies!
The sixth, the seventh...
The eighth, the ninth...
The frequencies of the tenth and eleventh dimensions!
The M in M-theory...
Stands for Magic!
For Mystery!
For Membrane (hymen)!
It is the most important prerequisite to be a goddess!

name: Takuji
message: "Aaaagh!"
The circuit in my mind felt like it was on fire. My quantum mind connected with all dimensional spaces.
The mind of the savior is the quantum mind!
It traverses the infinite multiverse and accomplishes this great feat!

name: Takuji
message: "Agh!"

name: Takuji
message: "The light... The packets of light..."
"Take shape."

name: Takuji
message: "What... is this..."

name: Takuji
message: "I just have to reach a little further."

name: Riruru
message: "Takudjii-kuuun..."

name: Takuji
message: "A little further."

name: Riruru
message: "Ii amn Riruru."

name: Riruru
message: "I'm Riruru!"

name: Takuji
message: "D-Did I mess up?"
Even using the power of the savior, that was my limit.
I only managed to restore her voice... Her body still looked like a bad scribble.

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-Why do you look like that?"

name: Riruru
message: "Look? Hmm?"

name: Riruru
message: "Wait, what?!
What happened?!"

name: Takuji
message: "Why did you end up looking like that?"

name: Riruru
message: "Well, because... that's how you made me."

name: Takuji
message: "I-It's my fault?"

name: Riruru
message: "Yeah... This body is probably just like that drawing."

name: Takuji
message: "Eh?"
Riruru-chan pointed toward the picture I had drawn on the wall.

name: Riruru
message: "Last time, I materialized myself with my own power, but this time it was with your power."
Oh, so... that's why she ended up looking like a scribbled drawing.
I was the one who drew that awful scribble that she ended up looking like.

name: Takuji
message: "I'm sorry. Even as the savior, I didn't have enough power."

name: Riruru
message: "No, it's all right."

name: Riruru
message: "Next time you call me, you should look at a proper icon while you tune the Holy Surge."

name: Takuji
message: "A proper icon?"

name: Riruru
message: "Yeah, if you make an icon that you want, it should turn out perfect."

name: Takuji
message: "A proper icon, huh..."

name: Riruru
message: "If you draw the icon right, you can call whatever kind of Riruru you want."

name: Takuji
message: "R-Really?"

name: Riruru
message: "Of course! I'm the Mahou Shoujo Riruru."

name: Riruru
message: "But more importantly, the battle yesterday..."

name: Takuji
message: "Oh, yeah. You were fighting with some kind of black Riruru-chan."

name: Riruru
message: "Yeah... She always gets in my way."

name: Takuji
message: "Gets in your way?"

name: Riruru
message: "Yeah, she's a bad person. The color black is a symbol of evil, you know?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah."

name: Riruru
message: "So she's a demon."

name: Takuji
message: "What does she do that gets in your way?"

name: Riruru
message: "Isn't there something that comes to mind, Takuji? A really nasty feeling."

name: Takuji
message: "Them!"

name: Riruru
message: "Yeah. The people who put out those weird, nasty frequencies are all demons."

name: Takuji
message: "Weird frequencies?"

name: Riruru
message: "Yeah, we call that frequency the Black Surge."

name: Takuji
message: "Black Surge?"

name: Riruru
message: "Yeah, my frequency is the Holy Surge... and that pitch black surge that those people put out... That's the Black Surge."

name: Takuji
message: "The pitch black surge..."

name: Riruru
message: "Yeah. Be careful about the Black Surge. Although you're the savior, so you shouldn't be able to get infected."

name: Takuji
message: "Infected? Do you mean the Black Surge can infect something?"

name: Riruru
message: "Not just something... It can infect anything. The Black Surge turns everything in existence pitch black."

name: Takuji
message: "Everything?"

name: Riruru
message: "Yes, everything."

name: Riruru
message: "The people on the Black Surge are trying to destroy the world. That's why they're trying to stop us from returning the world to the sky."

name: Riruru
message: "Originally, they were just like a shadow... They were my dregs, but they keep growing stronger."

name: Takuji
message: "Why is that happening?"

name: Riruru
message: "Black Riruru multiplies by devouring human anxiety, and the anxiety in the world has suddenly increased in the past few days."

name: Takuji
message: "The anxiety in the world?"

name: Riruru
message: "That's right. Humanity is connected by their unconscious. It's not just the people around you that are growing anxious."

name: Riruru
message: "The entire world is full of anxiety."

name: Riruru
message: "The sky is full of anxious words..."

name: Takuji
message: "Isn't that really bad?"

name: Riruru
message: "Yeah, that's why my father is going to descend upon this world today."

name: Takuji
message: "Eh? Your father... You mean..."

name: Riruru
message: "Yes, the omniscient and omnipotent god Yog-Sothoth."

name: Takuji
message: "Yog-Sothoth... That's God's name. And he's going to descend upon the earth today."

name: Riruru
message: "Yeah, he wants to meet the savior."

name: Takuji
message: "I-I'm kind of nervous."

name: Riruru
message: "You'll be fine. You'll just have to match his channel, like you did with me."

name: Takuji
message: "Why?"

name: Riruru
message: "An omniscient and omnipotent God is the world itself. To look at the world itself, you would have to elevate yourself to his level, right?"

name: Riruru
message: "For instance, if a two dimensional human wanted to look at the entire two dimensional world..."

name: Takuji
message: "He would have to look at it from the third dimension!"

name: Riruru
message: "Yeah, so you'll have to tune yourself to a higher dimension. But it'll be fine. You're doing it right now!"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah..."
Meeting with God. To think I've come that far...
The savior will meet with God.
The Father Himself...

name: Riruru
message: "Also, I was wondering, Takuji-kun, have you noticed the fake Takuji?"

name: Takuji
message: "Fake Takuji?"

name: Riruru
message: "Yeah. Just like I'm here for you, Takuji-kun... It seems like Black Riruru has a fake Takuji-kun."

name: Takuji
message: "A fake..."

name: Takuji
message: "Ah!"
Now that I think of it...

name: Female Student
message: "Um, I heard from someone that you said the prophecy wouldn't come true."

name: Female Student
message: "Yokoyama Yasuko is in my class, and she told me that you said the prophecy could never come true."

name: Female Student
message: "Eh? Uh, I heard it the day after Takashima-san committed suicide."

name: Takuji
message: "In other words, I have a doppelganger."

name: Riruru
message: "I knew you must have noticed something."

name: Takuji
message: "I did... I see. So Black Riruru created an imposter to deny my prophecy."

name: Riruru
message: "Yeah. So here, Takuji-kun. Take this!"

name: Takuji
message: "What is this?"

name: Riruru
message: "Moe moe item!"

name: Takuji
message: "Huh?"

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-What is it?"

name: Riruru
message: "It's a white coat."

name: Takuji
message: "I know, but I don't understand. Why a white coat?"

name: Riruru
message: "I was kidding about the moe part. Seriously speaking, this is made of the same white matter as my clothes."

name: Takuji
message: "White matter?"

name: Riruru
message: "Yeah, the matter in it is white. To put it simply, this coat is made of the very concept of whiteness instead of any simple white material."

name: Takuji
message: "Made of the very concept of whiteness?"

name: Riruru
message: "Yeah. You could say it actually is White Riruru."

name: Takuji
message: "You mean this is..."

name: Riruru
message: "God's cloth."
This is God's cloth...

name: Riruru
message: "These holy robes were made just for you, Takuji-kun."
I see. Now that I think of it, saints always have holy robes.
As the savior, my holy robes are the concept of whiteness itself. These robes suit my position.
Eh?
What is this sound?
When I looked up... Riruru-chan was gone.
I was alone in the darkness of my base.

name: Takuji
message: "Light..."
There's a light on... Was it on before?
Well, that's not important.

name: Takuji
message: "My phone is ringing!"
A message from Tachibana?
What is it?
The message only said, "Something big just happened."
Something big?

name: Takuji
message: "Ah?! C-Crap!"
I checked the clock... it was already 6:00.

name: Takuji
message: "I forgot to send the curse mail to Senagawa!"

name: Takuji
message: "Now the prediction isn't going to..."
What a failure. I totally forgot about the curse mail.

name: Takuji
message: "To think that the savior would..."
In the darkness, I nearly fell over.
And my head was hurting...

name: Takuji
message: "This isn't good. Anyway, I should go up to the surface."

name: Takuji
message: "Crap... It's already evening."
It was already starting to get dark.

name: Takuji
message: "How did so much time pass?"
I don't know where the time went.
I'm completely untethered from the progression of time.

name: Takuji
message: "Huh?!"
I heard voices from behind the school.
The voices were coming toward me.

name: Takuji
message: "...This is bad."
A crowd of people surrounded me before I could escape into my secret base.
They must have been waiting for me to appear.
Damn it... Did they come to ask me why the prediction didn't come true?

name: Kimika
message: "U-Um, Mamiya-sama..."
Tachibana's voice is shaking. She's scared... This is bad...
Even the strongest person in recorded history would have trouble fending off this many people.
My only choice is to run... But can I?
When should I dash?
Crap... Don't rush it. Stay calm and make a logical decision. I'm the savior.

name: Kimika
message: "I-I saw it..."

name: Takuji
message: "N-No... Th-This is..."
A-Anyway, I have to say something... I have to come up with an excuse.

name: Kimika
message: "Mrs. Senagawa really died! I was so moved! Your power did it, my savior!"
What... did she just say?

name: Kimika
message: "I was waiting in the courtyard, just like you ordered me to... and Mrs. Senagawa really fell. She splattered all over the ground."

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-What?"

name: Kimika
message: "It was the rooftop above the fourth floor, so she fell from five stories up. I didn't think that was high enough to kill someone outright, but she just went splat."
Just like I ordered you to?

name: Kimika
message: "Yes. You specified the time and location, didn't you?"
I even specified the time and location?

name: Takuji
message: "R-Really?"

name: Takuji
message: "That's right."
I remember... Every time my phone vibrated, I sent a message to Senagawa.
And... I managed to drive her to suicide.
Why did I forget that?

name: Takuji
message: "This is it."
The Black Surge is the cause... That's why my memory gets fuzzy sometimes.

name: Kimika
message: "U-Um, my savior, are you all right?"

name: Takuji
message: "...I'm fine."
Crap... This has happened before too.
When time jumps ahead... When I'm missing parts of my memory...
It's all because of Black Riruru's Black Surge!

name: Yasuko
message: "S-So this is the savior, Mamiya-sama..."

name: Kimika
message: "Yes... From now on, the Mamiya-sama who is the savior will always be wearing his holy robes."

name: Takuji
message: "Why do you say that?"

name: Kimika
message: "Eh? You messaged me... and said to beware of your imposter."

name: Yasuko
message: "I saw the fake Mamiya-sama!"

name: Takuji
message: "Saw my imposter..."

name: Yasuko
message: "Yes, his voice and face are just like yours, but he acts completely different. Kind of, like..."

name: Takuji
message: "A nasty feeling."

name: Yasuko
message: "Yes, exactly."

name: Takuji
message: "Be careful... That's the Black Surge."

name: Yasuko
message: "The Black Surge?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah. The frequency of the demons. Normal humans would just perceive it as a feeling of unease, but if you're exposed to it for a long period of time, you'll be infected."

name: Yasuko
message: "Infected?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, with the demon's ideas."

name: Yasuko
message: "The demon's... ideas?"

name: Takuji
message: "That's right. Beware the Black Surge."
No, I'm the one who really has to be wary of it.
The Black Surge is incredibly dangerous because it can interfere with the savior's brain.
My memory loss earlier... and my headaches... Those must have been irregularities in my Savior Brain caused by the Black Surge's attacks.
I don't know when the Black Surge will attack again.
Is there nothing I can do to stop it?
No... Think.
I've obtained all knowledge and wisdom.
There's no world that my Savior Brain can't solve.
Think.
Think and choose!
Find the correct choice within the infinite possibilities!
Carefully pick just one choice from within the infinite sea.
I used my infinite wisdom as the savior to pick the correct choice from the vast ocean of possibilities.
That's it. I just need to suppress the source of the Black Surge.

name: Takuji
message: "Yokoyama Yasuko..."

name: Yasuko
message: "Yes!"

name: Yasuko
message: "You truly are the real one!"

name: Takuji
message: "...What do you mean?"

name: Yasuko
message: "Oh, nothing. The fake Mamiya-sama couldn't remember my name."

name: Takuji
message: "Hmph, don't compare me to that imposter, you fool."

name: Yasuko
message: "Oh, I-I'm so sorry!"

name: Takuji
message: "You know the Wakatsuki sisters, don't you?"

name: Yasuko
message: "The Wakatsuki sisters? Eh? Uh, you mean..."

name: Takuji
message: "You're in the same club as them. Wakatsuki Kagami and Tsukasa."

name: Takuji
message: "What is it?!"

name: Yasuko
message: "Um... I... don't know them..."
"I don't...
know them..."

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-What?"

name: Yasuko
message: "Eh? Um, well... What does Mr. Wakatsuki look like?"

name: Takuji
message: "The Wakatsuki sisters! The twins, Kagami and Tsukasa."

name: Yasuko
message: "Eh? They're... twins?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah. They're twins. The older one is named Kagami... and the younger one is Tsukasa."

name: Yasuko
message: "The older one is Kagami-san... and the younger one is Tsukasa-san... right?"
That's ridiculous. She was in the same club as the Wakatsuki sisters.
And yet she says... she doesn't know them?
Think.
Understand the situation.
Put it into words.
Extract meaning.
Case 1.
Yokoyama Yasuko is lying.
Her relationship with the Wakatsuki sisters is inconvenient for her, so she's trying to hide the truth.

name: Takuji
message: "Tachibana!"

name: Kimika
message: "Yes?"

name: Takuji
message: "You're in the next class. Your class joins up with ours for physical education. You know them, right?"

name: Kimika
message: "Uh... Unfortunately, no I don't."

name: Takuji
message: "Wha―!"
Akasaka, Kitami... All the other people from Tachibana's class had the same expression.
They were reacting as if the Wakatsuki sisters had never existed to begin with.
What's going on?
Are they all lying?
No, that's impossible. I can read their minds.
It's especially easy to read the wavering heart of a liar, but the wavering I feel here is different.
The wavering here makes it feel like they don't even understand what I'm saying.
Then what other possibilities are there?

name: Takuji
message: "Ah!"
Classic memory loss.
Gaps in my memory.
I know these symptoms... I...
I've experienced these symptoms many times before.

name: Takuji
message: "Black Surge..."

name: Yasuko
message: "Black Surge?"
These symptoms... I'm sure of it.
Changing memories... Changing actions...
The Black Surge is trying to dye everything black.
I see...
Those Black Surge bastards. They've erased all their memories relating to the Wakatsuki sisters.
Considering my memory loss earlier, it wouldn't be hard for them to completely erase a normal human's memory.
The Black Surge is a far greater foe than I originally thought.
Which means the information about the other Black Surge transmitter, Otonashi Ayana, must have been erased too.
They've undermined my plan to suppress the source of the Black Surge.

name: Yasuko
message: "Um, my savior."
This is bad...
They're getting anxious.
My expression is making them anxious.
For some reason, Tachibana is smiling, but the rest are growing anxious.
No, the savior can't allow this to happen!
Black Riruru loves anxiety. She multiplies by eating it.
She devours anxiety then dyes the world with the Black Surge.
No, I can't make them anxious. I can't allow them to be fearful!
Calm down.
Yes... calm.
Calm... Calm... Calm...
I chanted it three times.
And then...

name: Kimika
message: "There's no problem, right?"

name: Takuji
message: "Eh?"

name: Takuji
message: "Oh, yeah... No problem."
I did my best to answer with a smile.

name: Takuji
message: "Okay then, there's no problem. That's enough."
In that moment, all their faces relaxed.
They were relieved by the savior's smile.
But still...
I see. This is the highest level...
This is the highest level of warfare.
The Black Surge emitted by Black Riruru can erase people's memories... No, maybe it can even overwrite them.
I don't know what memories are real. In this battle, I have to doubt even my own memories.
And I can't make the people anxious. I have to eliminate the anxiety.
The more anxiety there is in the world, the stronger the Black Surge grows.
I have to eliminate humanity's anxiety.
Eliminate the anxiety...
That's it.
My savior brain came up with a new idea.

name: Takuji
message: "First, Akasaka... I have orders for you."

name: Megu
message: "All right."

name: Takuji
message: "Your dead boyfriend was into drugs, right?"

name: Megu
message: "Eh? Um..."

name: Takuji
message: "You can't lie to me."

name: Megu
message: "I-I'm sorry!"

name: Takuji
message: "Drugs debilitate humans... You must purge the world of them."

name: Megu
message: "B-But there's no way I could do that by the 20th."

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, but you could cleanse this city."

name: Megu
message: "Eh?"

name: Takuji
message: "Steal the drugs from all the drug dealers in this city."

name: Megu
message: "S-Steal... But they're..."

name: Takuji
message: "There should be no problem. They're all going to die in four days. It doesn't matter who they are, even if they're soldiers or yakuza."

name: Megu
message: "B-But... we're just..."

name: Takuji
message: "There should be no problem if everyone here helps. There's strength in numbers. Even a yakuza member couldn't do anything against this many people."

name: Takuji
message: "And... use Nishimura, Numada, and Iinuma. They should know where the drugs are being sold."

name: Megu
message: "Nishimura and Numada? B-But how?"

name: Takuji
message: "You said you would do anything, didn't you?"

name: Megu
message: "O-Of course!"

name: Takuji
message: "Then offer Nishimura your body."

name: Megu
message: "Nishimura? Wh-Why?"

name: Takuji
message: "Apparently, Nishimura wants to have sex. He doesn't care if he dies so long as he can have sex."

name: Megu
message: "B-But offering him my body is..."

name: Takuji
message: "Do you have a complaint?"

name: Megu
message: "Ah, no. It's nothing. I'll do it."

name: Takuji
message: "And Kitami... you do it with him too."

name: Satoko
message: "Eh? Wh-Why me?"

name: Takuji
message: "When you guys were taking stimulants, you had a threesome with Shiroyama, didn't you?"

name: Satoko
message: "Eh?"

name: Megu
message: "H-How do you know that?"

name: Takuji
message: "You should stop treating the savior like a normal human."

name: Megu
message: "I-I'm sorry!"

name: Takuji
message: "And, Yokoyama Yasuko."

name: Yasuko
message: "Y-Yes?"
Her face was stiff with fear.
Well, unlike the other two, she's young, and I don't think she's had much experience with men, so...

name: Takuji
message: "Go to the anime shop in Suginomiya and buy a Mahou Shoujo Riruru poster."

name: Yasuko
message: "Huh?"

name: Takuji
message: "Don't make that stupid face at me. I won't say it again. I need a Mahou Shoujo Riruru poster in order to save you. Go buy it!"

name: Yasuko
message: "U-Um, what does that..."

name: Kimika
message: "The character drawn by animation director Horinoguchi Yuuko! We absolutely can't do without that."

name: Takuji
message: "You're pretty quick on the uptake."

name: Kimika
message: "Yes. I am your servant, after all."

name: Yasuko
message: "Um, excuse me, I don't really understand."

name: Takuji
message: "Argh..."
She's useless. She doesn't even know that much?
I didn't think ignorance was such a terrible plight.
I gave up. I wrote it down and passed it to her.

name: Takuji
message: "Now then, all of you, carry out your orders!"

name: Takuji
message: "If you fail, nothing but death awaits you!"
They all ran off in fear.
They ran desperately... like hares from a hunter.
Run, run... That's it, run for your lives.
Death is at your heels.
You must all run to escape it!
The name on my phone's display was Yokoyama Yasuko.

name: Takuji
message: "Yokoyama, huh... That was fast."
An hour hadn't even passed. She must have ridden her bike to Suginomiya and back already.
That would be pretty fast even if she already knew where to look.

name: Yasuko
message: "Ha, ha, ha, my savior!"

name: Takuji
message: "Yokoyama, huh..."

name: Yasuko
message: "I bought them!"

name: Takuji
message: "Good."

name: Yasuko
message: "A-And..."

name: Takuji
message: "Hmm? What is it?"

name: Yasuko
message: "Um, there's someone who says she wants to meet with you."

name: Takuji
message: "Again? Go ahead and bring her along, then. I don't mind."

name: Yasuko
message: "U-Um, there are police at the school right now, so the school grounds are closed off."

name: Takuji
message: "Closed off?"

name: Yasuko
message: "Yes, because of Mrs. Senagawa's suicide. They weren't here when we left the school, but..."

name: Takuji
message: "I see... After you left, the police and ambulance came, and the school grounds were closed off."
Well, I should've expected that.

name: Yasuko
message: "Several of my friends were taken in as suspects... Thankfully, all of the people who were gathered by the pool left the school immediately to carry out your orders, so none of them were caught."

name: Takuji
message: "So you can't get onto the school grounds..."

name: Yasuko
message: "What should I do?"

name: Takuji
message: "Hehehe... That's not a problem. I'll tell you a place where we can rendezvous. Wait for me there."

name: Yasuko
message: "Understood!"

name: Takuji
message: "There's an irrigation canal behind the school, near the old pool."

name: Yasuko
message: "An irrigation canal... Oh, right."

name: Takuji
message: "There's a place where the fence is broken. You can enter the sewers from there."

name: Yasuko
message: "The sewers?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yes. Go down to the canal entrance and wait for me there."

name: Yasuko
message: "U-Understood!"
Of course, the shortest route here is through the manhole by the pool, but that's not the only way to get here.
Actually, it would be possible to enter the reservoir tank from any manhole, since it's connected to the sewers.

The entrance to the sewers from the irrigation canal behind the school is especially useful, since the drop isn't that far and an adult can easily fit through. The fence is also broken, and there's no manhole cover to remove like there is here.

name: Takuji
message: "...Yokoyama."

name: Yasuko
message: "Y-Yes."

name: Takuji
message: "Hmm... Just as ordered."

name: Kimika
message: "We bought the poster you asked for, too. Look at Horinoguchi's shading... It looks so soft, doesn't it, my savior?"

name: Takuji
message: "You mean you went along with her?"

name: Yasuko
message: "Ah, I-I'm sorry. I didn't know where the anime shop was..."

name: Kimika
message: "I'm the savior's servant, so I know all about anime."

name: Takuji
message: "That has nothing to do with being a servant. Anyway, you said on the phone..."

name: Kimika
message: "Yes. Um, the person I brought along was none other than..."

name: Takuji
message: "...Kiyokawa?"

name: Takuji
message: "You actually brought a teacher to me? Tachibana, what is this?"

name: Kimika
message: "Hahahaha, you don't trust me, huh?
It's true, she is a teacher, but she believes in your prediction."

name: Takuji
message: "She does?"

name: Takuji
message: "Hmm, your only friend in the school... You changed your mind because she died from Takashima's curse?"

name: Asumi
message: "Huh?!"

name: Takuji
message: "You didn't think the students knew. It's written all over your face."

name: Kimika
message: "Mamiya-sama is the savior. You shouldn't try to keep secrets from him."

name: Asumi
message: "Ah, all right."

name: Takuji
message: "You two were the same age, and you were friends outside of the workplace. That's why she came to you for advice about the curse mail."
I was right. I felt more than just surprise in her... I felt her fear.
She became as pale as a ghost.

name: Asumi
message: "A-At first... she thought it was just a prank."

name: Asumi
message: "So... she insisted she was going to find the culprit and have them arrested. She said there was no such thing as a curse."

name: Takuji
message: "Oh, really... And?"

name: Asumi
message: "But... she looked strange yesterday. She was always looking over her shoulder, like she was afraid of something."

name: Takuji
message: "Of something?"

name: Asumi
message: "She said she felt like someone was watching her. She looked worse every time I saw her..."

name: Takuji
message: "And eventually... she jumped off the roof."

name: Asumi
message: "Y-Yes. Building C was..."

name: Takuji
message: "That's right. That's where Takashima's accident happened."

name: Asumi
message: "That accident always bothered her."

name: Takuji
message: "Bothered her? That's ridiculous. She covered up her crime and ran away from the punishment."

name: Asumi
message: "C-Covered it up?"

name: Takuji
message: "That accident was a result of excessive bullying."

name: Takuji
message: "Akasaka Megu, Kitami Satoko, and Tachibana Kimika were involved in her bullying. Do you know what they had in common?"

name: Asumi
message: "Th-The Fine Arts Club..."

name: Takuji
message: "Exactly. The Fine Arts Club that only existed for half a year... That club's advisor was none other than Senagawa Yui."

name: Asumi
message: "B-But Yui was..."

name: Takuji
message: "There's no way she wouldn't have known! At the very least, that's what Takashima Zakuro thought!"

name: Asumi
message: "Ah!"

name: Takuji
message: "Senagawa knew about the bullying, but she ignored it. She should have been Takashima's ally as a teacher, but she betrayed her. It's only natural Senagawa would be hated the most."

name: Takuji
message: "After Takashima's death, her hate followed Senagawa as a curse."

name: Asumi
message: "I... was shown the articles of the deceased after she committed suicide."

name: Takuji
message: "Articles of the deceased?"

name: Asumi
message: "She was getting curse mail from Takashima up until the moment of her death."

name: Takuji
message: "You saw Senagawa's cell phone?"

name: Kimika
message: "I picked it up!"

name: Asumi
message: "And... In those messages I saw how Takashima-san's vengeful spirit chased Yui to her death."

name: Takuji
message: "I see. You saw the curse mail from her vengeful spirit."

name: Asumi
message: "Yes. B-Before I saw that, I never thought anything so terrible existed in this world. So then, I..."

name: Takuji
message: "Then?"

name: Asumi
message: "Um, I heard a rumor about you, Mamiya-ku... No, Mamiya-sama."

name: Asumi
message: "Originally, that curse was supposed to haunt the other people who bullied Takashima-san: Akasaka-san, Kitami-san, and Tachibana-san, too."

name: Asumi
message: "But there's a person who can dispel the curse. That's why those three didn't die."

name: Asumi
message: "That person also predicted the time and place of Yui's death..."

name: Takuji
message: "I see. So you came to speak to the prophet?"

name: Asumi
message: "No, you're not a prophet... You're something greater. You're going to save people from the great disaster that's going to happen soon. You're the savior."

name: Takuji
message: "I see. Did you come here to be saved?"

name: Asumi
message: "Yes!"

name: Takuji
message: "Who do you expect to believe that story?"

name: Asumi
message: "Eh?"

name: Takuji
message: "Could I ask you to leave this place?"

name: Asumi
message: "Ah, eh?"

name: Asumi
message: "I got so scared watching Yui... Watching her go crazy..."

name: Asumi
message: "She was so scared... So scared of something... When I looked at her cell phone, I understood the fear she felt. Then I, I..."

name: Takuji
message: "It's no use."

name: Asumi
message: "Wh-Why not? Please save me too!"

name: Takuji
message: "You've deceived many people in your life."

name: Asumi
message: "Deceived?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yes. So did Senagawa. That's why I didn't save her. Because she was a teacher."

name: Asumi
message: "Because she was a teacher..."

name: Takuji
message: "That's right. For years, you've lied to people in the name of education."

name: Asumi
message: "Lied... to people..."

name: Takuji
message: "That's right. You teachers have hidden the truth from the people!"

name: Asumi
message: "B-But I―"

name: Takuji
message: "No, you have hidden many truths from the people!"

name: Asumi
message: "Th-That's wrong. That's not true..."

name: Takuji
message: "No, it's not wrong! You've willfully spread the lies! You've covered up the truth!"

name: Asumi
message: "That's not it... That's not..."

name: Takuji
message: "You were listening to my speech from the hallway, weren't you?"

name: Asumi
message: "Eh?"

name: Takuji
message: "Did you think I didn't notice you listening?"

name: Takuji
message: "At that time, you were quivering with fear... You quivered as you heard the truth."

name: Asumi
message: "Yes! It's true. I'm sorry. I'm sorry!"

name: Takuji
message: "You were fearful of the fact that you had willfully taught lies!"

name: Asumi
message: "N-No, that's not it."

name: Asumi
message: "I-I... I didn't willfully teach lies. That's not true. Forgive me. Please forgive me."

name: Takuji
message: "It wasn't of your own will? Then why did you become a teacher? Why did you choose that profession?"

name: Asumi
message: "I-It's just... Both my parents were teachers, and my grandmother and grandfather too, so I became a teacher like them without even thinking about it."

name: Takuji
message: "But it's something you chose. You chose it yourself! It's not your parents' fault!"

name: Asumi
message: "Y-Yes! I understand. I understand, but I'm a human before I'm a teacher. I, I... You're the savior, aren't you?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, I'm the savior. I'm the person who will save humanity."

name: Asumi
message: "Th-Then... Please. Please save me too. Please, save me!"
This woman... How pathetic.
Even if her friend was killed by the curse, she's still an adult. Why is she so scared?
Hehehe... So this is the person they revere as a pastor?

name: Takuji
message: "Hehehehe... Is it really that scary?"

name: Asumi
message: "Y-Yes!"

name: Takuji
message: "Do you want to be saved even if it means throwing away your life as a teacher?"

name: Asumi
message: "Yes!"

name: Takuji
message: "So you're prepared to do even that."

name: Asumi
message: "Yes, of course! If you'll save me, I'll throw it away! I'll throw it away!"

name: Takuji
message: "So you say, but talk is cheap."

name: Asumi
message: "I'm not just saying it. Please believe me. Please save me. I beg of you!"

name: Takuji
message: "Oh, really... So you're prepared to do as I say?"

name: Asumi
message: "Yes! I am!"

name: Takuji
message: "Then I'll have you show me your devotion."

name: Asumi
message: "Y-Yes... I'll show you my devotion."

name: Takuji
message: "Are you prepared to throw everything away?"

name: Takuji
message: "First, your life as a teacher."

name: Asumi
message: "I'll throw it away!"

name: Takuji
message: "Do you have any family?"

name: Asumi
message: "My family? I have a mother and a father."

name: Takuji
message: "So you're an only child?"

name: Asumi
message: "Yes."

name: Takuji
message: "Right now. Go fuck your father."

name: Asumi
message: "Eh?"

name: Takuji
message: "I won't say it again. Go have sex with your father."

name: Asumi
message: "Um, you mean..."

name: Takuji
message: "Take a picture and send it to me. If you send me that picture, I'll think about it."

name: Takuji
message: "First, throw away your life as a teacher, then the reason you became a teacher... Throw away your parents."

name: Asumi
message: "M-My parents?"

name: Takuji
message: "Throw away your parents... and throw away your humanity."

name: Asumi
message: "M-My humanity?"

name: Takuji
message: "Would you call a person human after they've had sex with their own father?"

name: Takuji
message: "If you're prepared to throw away everything, then I'll think about it. I'll only save you if you make yourself into a subhuman existence."

name: Asumi
message: "A s-subhuman existence..."

name: Takuji
message: "You don't have much time. Disappear for me, now... Hurry up and go fuck your father!"

name: Kimika
message: "Wait a second! Are you going to let her leave after you've told her so much? We can't trust her. We should at least have someone watch her..."

name: Takuji
message: "That won't be necessary."

name: Takuji
message: "Remember this. All of you..."

name: Takuji
message: "Being able to stop Takashima's curse also means I can do the reverse."

name: Asumi
message: "The reverse...?"

name: Takuji
message: "I can curse anyone with the same curse that killed Senagawa..."

name: Takuji
message: "Kiyokawa, if you think for even a second about betraying me... In that very instant."

name: Asumi
message: "I-In that instant..."

name: Takuji
message: "I'll kill you just like I did Senagawa."

name: Asumi
message: "Ah!"

name: Takuji
message: "And the same goes for you, Tachibana... And you too, Yokoyama."

name: Yasuko
message: "I-I absolutely wouldn't betray you, my savior."

name: Kimika
message: "Hahahaha, you don't need to tell me that. If anyone tried to stop you, I would kill them myself."

name: Takuji
message: "Hehehehe... Well, it's your choice whether you want to believe me or not. And you, Kiyokawa."

name: Takuji
message: "Kiyokawa, throw away everything. Being a teacher, being a daughter, and being human."

name: Takuji
message: "Once you've freed yourself from your chains... you may join me."
Hehehe... Fear.
Fear is the tightest binding.
Fear is the greatest submission.
People try to run from their fears.
From absolute fear.
And that gives birth to religion.
People fleeing their fears give birth to religion.
I'll let her swim... and give her freedom.
Freedom wasn't given to her.
Freedom was given to the fear lurking within her.
Freedom and fear have the greatest synergy.
By making her free, I will convert her fear into devotion to me.
Completely...

name: Yasuko
message: "W-Wow... I didn't know this place existed."

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah... This is the ark."

name: Yasuko
message: "The ark?"

name: Kimika
message: "That's a wonderful name, my savior."

name: Takuji
message: "Only the people gathered here will be able to go beyond the world's final day."

name: Yasuko
message: "Go beyond the world's final day..."

name: Takuji
message: "That's right. This is a place to gather the people who will live on after the world's destruction."

name: Yasuko
message: "This is... the ark?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah. This is the ark I constructed. It's larger and more durable than Noah's."

name: Yasuko
message: "A place constructed by the savior..."

name: Takuji
message: "Gather the believers here until the final day. Only allow those who are pure of heart within the ark."

name: Yasuko
message: "U-Understood."

name: Kimika
message: "Hehehehe... Leave it to me, my savior. I'll gather a ton of people."

name: Kimika
message: "Ah, it's my phone. It's from Megu."

name: Takuji
message: "I don't mind. Answer her."

name: Kimika
message: "Hello... Eh? What?"

name: Kimika
message: "W-Wait, stabbed?"
Stabbed... So one of the people I ordered to attack the drug dealers got injured.

name: Kimika
message: "Eh? Oh, o-one second. My savior, there's an emergency. It looks like Nishimura-kun was stabbed by one of the yakuza."

name: Takuji
message: "Tell them to meet up with us at the entrance I told you about earlier... and tell them to bring the injured person."

name: Kimika
message: "Megu said he's covered in blood, so they need to bring him to a hospital right away."

name: Takuji
message: "Are you stupid?! Don't you understand? All the medicine in the world is worthless compared to my miraculous power as the savior!"

name: Kimika
message: "Oh! my savior, are you saying you'll heal his wounds?"

name: Takuji
message: "Of course. Christ miraculously healed the lepers in an instant. With my powers, I can even give life to a human that has been chopped into pieces."

name: Kimika
message: "Ohh, that's amazing. I was right to join you, my savior."

name: Takuji
message: "A prophet could take my place if all I had to do was make prophecies. I am the savior because I can perform miracles like no other."

name: Takuji
message: "Don't forget that."

name: Kimika
message: "Understood."

name: Kimika
message: "Let's go, Yasuko-chan. We have to go, double time."

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah... Bring them to me as soon as possible."

name: Kimika
message: "We've brought them, my savior."

name: Megu
message: "Um, this..."

name: Satoko
message: "The drug dealer suddenly stabbed Nishimura."

name: Nishimura
message: "It really hurts! It hurts so bad!"
Nishimura was being held up by Akasaka and Kitami. He really was covered in blood.

name: Takuji
message: "You're bleeding pretty badly."

name: Megu
message: "Y-You have to hurry."

name: Nishimura
message: "H-Help... T-Take me to the hospital..."

name: Takuji
message: "Hehehehe... Nishimura-kun, you can't die until you have sex, right?"

name: Takuji
message: "You even said you didn't care if you died after having sex."

name: Nishimura
message: "B-But... the hospital..."

name: Takuji
message: "Don't worry... I'll make you healthy enough to have sex."

name: Megu
message: "Mamiya-sama, is it true that you can heal his wounds?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, it's true. You still haven't let him fuck you, have you?"

name: Megu
message: "Eh? Um, you mean sex?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, that's what's important. Have you fucked him?"

name: Megu
message: "I told him... I would let him once we stole their drugs."

name: Takuji
message: "And that's all it took?"

name: Megu
message: "Ah, no... I said we could have a threesome."

name: Nishimura
message: "It fucking huuurts!"

name: Takuji
message: "Hehehe... Then once he's healed, let him fuck you as much as he wants."

name: Megu
message: "Eh? Oh, all right... But can you really heal him?"

name: Takuji
message: "That's obvious. More importantly, did you manage to steal them?"

name: Megu
message: "Oh, that's not a problem. We got the drugs!"

name: Takuji
message: "Oh, really..."
There were a lot of different kinds in the bag... There were six comparatively large packages. They were big enough to hold about a hundred grams each.

name: Takuji
message: "You found quite a lot."

name: Megu
message: "I got all my savings out of the bank. I held out all 1,680,000 yen in front of him and told him to sell me as much as he could."

name: Megu
message: "Most of those drug dealers don't have very much on them."

name: Takuji
message: "I see. So you showed them the money... and they brought you to their stashes. That's a pretty good idea."

name: Megu
message: "Thank you! We attacked whatever dealers we found just like that, but we messed up with the very last guy..."

name: Takuji
message: "And he got stabbed."
Well, of course he did.
They have to be desperate to sell this stuff. I think half a gram of stimulants go for close to 10,000 yen.
This much of it would probably worth sell for over a hundred million.
People get killed over that kind of money.

name: Satoko
message: "And this... We got this bottle along with the drugs."

name: Takuji
message: "A two liter bottle..."
A third of the two liter bottle was filled with liquid. It was colorless and transparent... This must be some kind of drug too.
I can figure out what this is later.

name: Takuji
message: "Carry Nishimura into the back."

name: Megu
message: "The back?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, behind that wall."

name: Nishimura
message: "Oww... It hurts so bad..."
It looked like he was still alert. His face was pale, but that was probably just anemia.

name: Takuji
message: "A miracle..."
Christ was said to be able to turn stones into bread.
Of course... I should be able to do the same thing.
Stone to bread...
Holy Surge radiated from my right hand.
The Holy Surge can make anything holy.
Even the evil drugs that Akasaka and the others stole... I can turn them into holy drugs.
I changed the arrangement of his molecules to match the picture in my mind.
Modern science still hasn't discovered this arrangement of molecules.
It's been called the ultimate material...
The ultimate material that was said to have been created in medieval Europe by the alchemist Paracelsus.
He called it elixir.
If you drink this all-purpose miracle potion, you can be cured of any disease.
My Holy Surge can change any drug into elixir.

name: Takuji
message: "Aaaah!"
I felt a moment of vertigo... That was the sign that I had succeeded in rearranging the drugs' molecules.

name: Takuji
message: "Haa... Now these drugs have been transformed into elixir."
I spread it on Nishimura's wound.

name: Nishimura
message: "Ow!"
Just a little should suffice... There wouldn't be any adverse effects if I used a lot, but it's effective even with just a little bit.
His face warped in pain for a moment.
I immediately took medical glue out of my toolbox and carefully closed his wound.
I also sent Holy Surge directly into him, which worked as a second all-purpose miracle drug.
After a few seconds, I pressed up on his wound, and...

name: Takuji
message: "Hmm... Success."
The wound was completely healed.
I watched him for a few minutes.
Color came back into his face as I watched.

name: Takuji
message: "Hehehe... His face is changing color by the second. Turning white, the holy color."

name: Takuji
message: "Proof that he's been purified."

name: Takuji
message: "How is it?"

name: Nishimura
message: "It doesn't hurt..."

name: Nishimura
message: "Huh? It doesn't hurt at all!"

name: Takuji
message: "Hahahaha... It doesn't, does it?"

name: Nishimura
message: "Why? Why? It really doesn't hurt!"
I washed his wound and lent him a change of clothes.
No more blood flowed from the healed wound.
The miracle was complete.
Chatter...
Naturally, the people began to stir when they saw Nishimura had been revived.
Because I completely healed a person who was on the verge of death in the span of a few minutes.
Not even the newest medicine and finest hospitals could do what I just did.

name: Nishimura
message: "It doesn't hurt! It doesn't hurt anymore!"

name: Megu
message: "S-Seriously?"

name: Nishimura
message: "Seriously! It doesn't hurt at all! Not at all!"
Chatter...
Chatter... Chatter... Chatter... Chatter...
Chatter, chatter... Chatter, chatter, chatter... Chatter, chatter, chatter, chatter...
The rustling changed into a commotion.
And then they...

name: Female Student
message: "It's a miracle!"

name: Male Student
message: "It's a miracle!"

name: Female Student
message: "He's the savior!"
"He's the savior! He's the savior! He's the savior! He's the savior! He's the savior! He's the savior!
He's our savior! He's our savior! He's our savior! He's our savior! He's our savior!"
There were a lot of people.
It was dark... The people in the back probably couldn't see me very well.
I couldn't tell how many people were gathered there.
They weren't all wearing school uniforms... There were even some that look too old to be in school.
I opened my mouth.
But those quiet words were drowned out in the commotion.
The crowd... didn't know I was trying to speak.
But...

name: Takuji
message: "This is a pretty good atmosphere."

name: Takuji
message: "Now then..."

name: Kimika
message: "Ah!"
When Tachibana noticed that I was trying to say something, she shouted...

name: Kimika
message: "Be qui―"
I quietly stopped her from yelling and silencing everyone.

name: Takuji
message: "It'll be fine just like this."

name: Takuji
message: "Just like this..."
I started talking in whispers.
The people in the front row who could see me stopped yelling.
They were eager to hear what I was saying.
They stopped yelling.
I revealed the truth in whispers.
I slowly, slowly revealed its outline.

name: Takuji
message: "The world is incomplete."

name: Takuji
message: "That is certain fact."

name: Takuji
message: "The world is filled with lies because it is incomplete."

name: Takuji
message: "Everyone calmly speaks of equality."

name: Takuji
message: "But everyone knows that the world is not equal."

name: Takuji
message: "Everyone calmly speaks of freedom."

name: Takuji
message: "But everyone knows that there is no freedom in the world."

name: Takuji
message: "Everyone calmly speaks of love."

name: Takuji
message: "But everyone knows that love is traitorous."

name: Takuji
message: "Everyone calmly says that you must not kill."

name: Takuji
message: "But everyone knows that the world is brimming with murderers."

name: Takuji
message: "Everyone calmly says that you must not lie."

name: Takuji
message: "But everyone knows that the speaker himself is a
liar."

name: Takuji
message: "Did anyone speak to us of this fact?"

name: Takuji
message: "No, no one did."

name: Takuji
message: "No one told us that fact."

name: Takuji
message: "And why?"

name: Takuji
message: "Why did no one tell us that fact?"

name: Takuji
message: "It's a simple fact."

name: Takuji
message: "Because all their mouths are filthy with lies!"

name: Takuji
message: "A filthy mouth can speak nothing but lies!"
Almost all of them were silent.
They just watched me.
Listened to me.
Listening to my every word... Watching my every movement...
My voice gradually grew louder. Its pitch grew more forceful.
Almost like anger.
Almost like grief.
Almost like joy.
Almost like anticipation.
My words included all those emotions.
In other words, truth.
The words of truth are a blade.
The words of truth are a bolt of lightning.
The words of truth split the sky.
Split the sky that is full of lies.

name: Takuji
message: "Why? Why?! Why are the mouths of the people filthy with lies?!"

name: Takuji
message: "Why are there words filthy with lies?!"

name: Takuji
message: "Is it malice?"

name: Takuji
message: "Is it the filth of malice?"

name: Takuji
message: "Because they hate you all?"

name: Takuji
message: "Because they hate the world?"

name: Takuji
message: "Is that why the world is filthy with lies?"

name: Takuji
message: "No!"

name: Takuji
message: "The answer is certainly no!"

name: Takuji
message: "Malice doesn't lie."

name: Takuji
message: "Malice isn't filthy."

name: Takuji
message: "Malice has no need for filth."

name: Takuji
message: "How could one dye that which is so black that it need not be dyed?"

name: Takuji
message: "Malice can't be dirtied."

name: Takuji
message: "Malice is so black that it can't be dirtied."

name: Takuji
message: "That which should be dirtied is that which can be dyed."

name: Takuji
message: "Yes, it is a pure heart."

name: Takuji
message: "A true heart."

name: Takuji
message: "Yes, people call that good intentions."

name: Takuji
message: "It was with good intentions that people dirtied the world with lies."

name: Takuji
message: "It was with good intentions that people dirtied it with words."

name: Takuji
message: "It's true!"

name: Takuji
message: "Good intentions! This most repulsive of emotions gives birth to words of filth!"

name: Takuji
message: "The road to hell is paved with good intentions!"

name: Takuji
message: "It is with good intentions that people walk the road to damnation!"

name: Takuji
message: "Good intentions conceal it!"

name: Takuji
message: "Our meaninglessness!"

name: Takuji
message: "Our ignorance!"

name: Takuji
message: "Our genesis and extinction will happen without us knowing or understanding anything."
My voice reached a fever pitch... Now, no one was talking.
Everyone intently listened to my words.
This is a technique that was frequently used by my old friend, Adolf Hitler.

name: Takuji
message: "Good intentions conceal all things."

name: Takuji
message: "Good intentions conceal all fear."

name: Takuji
message: "Why do they try to conceal it?"

name: Takuji
message: "It's simple!"

name: Takuji
message: "There is no meaning in the world!"

name: Takuji
message: "There is no meaning to any of your lives!"

name: Takuji
message: "What would happen if a person who was born into a meaningless life was suddenly sentenced to death?"

name: Takuji
message: "Because that person wouldn't recognize that all of human history was meaningless!"

name: Takuji
message: "What if a newborn infant was strangled, and his life ended after a mere ten minutes?"

name: Takuji
message: "Was there meaning in that infant's life?"

name: Takuji
message: "Is there meaning in a life of just ten minutes?"

name: Takuji
message: "But it's the same!"

name: Takuji
message: "If there's no meaning in that infant's life, the entire history of humanity is meaningless."

name: Takuji
message: "The oldest humans, Australopithecus, lived 5,400,00 years ago."

name: Takuji
message: "The genesis of the first life on Earth was 3.8 billion years ago."

name: Takuji
message: "It feels like an incredibly long, meaningful span of time."

name: Takuji
message: "But that's nothing more than an illusion."

name: Takuji
message: "Within the infinity of time, it's no different from a single instant."

name: Takuji
message: "Within infinity, 3.8 billions years or 5,400,000 years is just as much an instant as a life of ten minutes."

name: Takuji
message: "Time isn't what's important!"

name: Takuji
message: "Meaning is what's important!"

name: Takuji
message: "If there is no meaning in our lives, then they're no different than a life of ten minutes!"

name: Takuji
message: "But if there is meaning in a life, even a life of just ten minutes, then that life is significant."

name: Takuji
message: "So I ask!"

name: Takuji
message: "What is the meaning in your lives?"

name: Takuji
message: "What is humanity's meaning?"

name: Takuji
message: "What is the meaning to this world... this universe?"

name: Takuji
message: "What is the meaning to our existence?"

name: Takuji
message: "Who can answer that?"

name: Takuji
message: "Someone, try to answer it!"
null
null
Silence.
Complete silence.
No one answered... They couldn't answer.

name: Takuji
message: "An idiot would say this!"

name: Takuji
message: "Because of God."

name: Takuji
message: "They would say we have meaning because we were created by God."

name: Takuji
message: "Then I would ask that idiot!"

name: Takuji
message: "Why does God exist?"

name: Takuji
message: "What is the meaning to God's existence?"

name: Takuji
message: "Even God is not free of this question."

name: Takuji
message: "Everything is meaningless!"

name: Takuji
message: "There is no meaning in this world."

name: Takuji
message: "We are that newborn infant!"

name: Takuji
message: "Humanity is that newborn infant!"

name: Takuji
message: "God is that newborn infant!"

name: Takuji
message: "That newborn infant is everything that exists in this world!"

name: Takuji
message: "We live a short life of ten minutes."

name: Takuji
message: "They don't recognize that."

name: Takuji
message: "No one recognizes that."

name: Takuji
message: "They don't recognize our end, the world's end, the absolute end!"

name: Takuji
message: "But they have nothing but weak hearts."

name: Takuji
message: "We must accept the absurd and the irrational... We must understand it."

name: Takuji
message: "We must accept humanity's meaningless existence!"
Everyone looked at me anxiously.
I couldn't blame them... I had just revealed humanity's meaninglessness to them.
It was the same as a death sentence.

name: Takuji
message: "But once you recognize it."

name: Takuji
message: "Once you accept your meaningless life."

name: Takuji
message: "If we can't deny your existence."

name: Takuji
message: "As if"

name: Takuji
message: "a sunken ship"

name: Takuji
message: "in your heart,"

name: Takuji
message: "if"

name: Takuji
message: "that ship left..."

name: Takuji
message: "a ripple"

name: Takuji
message: "on the water"

name: Takuji
message: "where it sunk,"

name: Takuji
message: "like a flicker in the dark."

name: Takuji
message: "If there's a presentiment in your heart."

name: Takuji
message: "If there's a flicker or a ripple."

name: Takuji
message: "That..."

name: Takuji
message: "That is..."

name: Takuji
message: "The forepath toward the omen."

name: Takuji
message: "You are the forerunners of the omen."

name: Takuji
message: "All ye who hear my words!"

name: Takuji
message: "Recognize all that is irrational."

name: Takuji
message: "Accept all that is absurd."

name: Takuji
message: "And then."

name: Takuji
message: "Then search your heart."

name: Takuji
message: "That is where"

name: Takuji
message: "The forepath..."

name: Takuji
message: "Toward the omen lies."

name: Takuji
message: "Can you feel the forepath?"

name: Takuji
message: "Well?"

name: Takuji
message: "Can you feel it?"

name: Takuji
message: "I will lend you the power to feel it!"

name: Takuji
message: "I will lend you the power of purification!"

name: Takuji
message: "Meditate!"

name: Takuji
message: "There's no need to think!"

name: Takuji
message: "Just meditate so that you may feel it."

name: Takuji
message: "Don't think! Feel!"
I sprinkled the water I purified earlier on them.
The mysterious liquid that Akasaka had brought me...
I purified it with the Holy Surge.
I turned it into holy water!
The people were bewildered.
They simply gathered here so that they could be saved.
The truth is too heavy for the weak.
They were simply bewildered.
But the words of the savior sink into people with their sound, not their meaning.
Meditating people...
People just praying...
The Holy Surge sank into the weak people.
The holy sound that entered their ears made their eardrums vibrate, transmitting the surge to their brain.
The Holy Surge.
They woke with the surge.
To the truth...
The meditation continued.
The praying continued.
Until they felt it.
Until they discovered it...
